craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 303 E 15th Ave, Anchorage, AK 99501 Searching for something more intimate? Our 1 & 2 bedroom apartments in Anchorage, Alaska are ideal if you’re looking for comfort and convenience at the same time. At Kings Court Apartments, you get to live in a welcoming neighborhood, surrounded by nature, but without giving up on the opportunities a big city offers. Plus, we are pet-friendly, so bring your furry friends with you! Apartment Features: Electronic Thermostat Disposal Plush Carpeting Dishwasher Hard-style plank flooring Stove and Oven Range Window Blinds Refrigerator Fireplace in select units Community Features: Pet Friendly Community Close to nightlife, including Williwaw Social Flexible Rent 15-minute drive to Joint Base Elmendorf-Richardson 3 minutes from 5th Avenue Mall A Non-Smoking Community Convenient access to the Anchorage Train Station Laundry Facilities Elevator Located near the Anchorage Museum Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://redtailliving.com/7exl2lbh/kings-court Pricing and availability are subject to change.

craigslist.title: Beautiful Whitneyville Colonial-Newly Updated- 3 Bedrooms-1 1/2 Bath
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Beautifully updated Colonial in Whitenyville section of Hamden. This home offers the perfect blend of original architecture and open spaces. The inviting front porch welcomes you to stop and relax before entering the gracious foyer with original woodworking. The living room features a fireplace and French doors, creating a warm, cozy atmosphere. The kitchen offers good work and storage space and connects well to the dining room, perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. There are hardwood floors throughout the house. The second level has 3 bedrooms and a full bath The good size backyard has a deck to enjoy outdoor dining and a lovely yard for play. Located close to Yale, YNHH, golf course, Quinnipiac and neighborhood shops. This one is a beauty!! Ready for Tenants! No Pets Excellent Credit

craigslist.title: Amplia casa de 5 habitaciones y 5 baños - ¡DISPONIBLE AHORA!
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 1901 Harbor Bay Court, Kissimmee, FL 34741 Los exclusivos apartamentos de Miramar ofrecen 5 habitaciones, cada una con su propio baño privado, una amplia sala de estar y conexiones para lavadora y secadora. Nuestros apartamentos gozan de una ubicación céntrica, a solo 5 km del centro histórico de Kissimmee y a menos de 19 km de Disney World. En Miramar, puede comenzar el día en nuestro gimnasio o darse un chapuzón en nuestra espectacular piscina; nuestra comunidad relajada se adapta a todas sus necesidades. Una vez que nos visite, no querrá irse jamás. ¡Deje de buscar y empiece a vivir! Características del apartamento: Amplios planos de planta de 5 habitaciones disponibles Electrodomésticos de bajo consumo energético Cuarto de lavandería independiente con conexiones para lavadora y secadora de tamaño estándar. Unidades mejoradas disponibles Amplios vestidores Características de la comunidad: Arrendamiento en línea / Pago de alquiler / Solicitudes de mantenimiento Cerca de la ruta del autobús Lynx Piscina estilo resort. Zonas de barbacoa con áreas de reunión. Gimnasio Eventos mensuales para residentes Se admiten mascotas (pueden aplicarse restricciones). Casa club de lujo Cafetería Planos de planta virtuales Llama al: show contact info Para obtener más información, visítenos en: https://liveinsula.com/nn76ld2h/miramar *El precio del alquiler mostrado incluye únicamente la renta mensual del apartamento. Pueden aplicarse cargos mensuales adicionales, los cuales se detallarán en el Contrato de Arrendamiento para su revisión antes de firmarlo. Para obtener más información sobre cargos adicionales, comuníquese con nuestra oficina de arrendamiento.

craigslist.title: Sale or leasing to buy Single family house
craigslist.full_address: Coral Springs Drive, Wesley Chapel, FL 33544
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Gorgeous 4-Bedroom, 2.5-Bath Home in Wesley Chapel This beautiful 3,075 sq. ft. single-family home features 4 spacious bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, and a large covered and screened porch, offering the perfect combination of comfort, privacy, and convenience. The home features a spacious family room, a separate living room, a large kitchen with a breakfast area, and a formal dining room. Beautiful ceramic tile flooring runs throughout the home, and all rooms have been freshly painted. Large sliding glass doors open to the oversized screened porch, creating the perfect space for relaxing, entertaining, and enjoying Florida's outdoor lifestyle year-round. Located in a quiet and well-established neighborhood, this home offers a fantastic location with convenient access to shopping, dining, schools, medical facilities, and everyday amenities. This property is situated in a peaceful and desirable community while remaining close to major highways, including Interstate 275, making commuting easy and convenient. Rental Information Rent: $2,950 per month Sale Information Sale Price: $675,000 Don't miss this opportunity to own or rent a beautiful home in one of Wesley Chapel's most desirable locations. Rent-to-Own Opportunity This property is also available through a rent-to-own (lease-purchase) program. Rent-to-own provides an alternative path to homeownership for individuals who need additional time to improve their credit, save for a down payment, or qualify for traditional mortgage financing. Under a rent-to-own agreement: The tenant and owner enter into a lease-purchase contract. The lease term may range from one to five years. During the lease period, the tenant has the option to purchase the property. The purchase price is locked in at $675,000 and will not change during the lease term, regardless of future market value increases. The tenant pays an upfront option fee, typically between 6% and 10% of the purchase price, which may be credited toward the purchase if the option is exercised. Monthly rent is $2,950. Additional Financing Option The owner may consider providing seller financing of up to 60% for qualified buyers. Considering today's higher mortgage interest rates, rent-to-own can be an attractive option for buyers who wish to secure a home now while preparing for future financing opportunities. Don't miss this opportunity to own or rent this beautiful 4-bedroom home in one of Wesley Chapel's most desirable locations. Call or text: show contact info

house_ger.info: QR Code Link to This Post Gorgeous 4-Bedroom, 2.5-Bath Home in Wesley Chapel This beautiful 3,075 sq. ft. single-family home features 4 spacious bedrooms, 2.5 bathrooms, and a large covered and screened porch, offering the perfect combination of comfort, privacy, and convenience. The home features a spacious family room, a separate living room, a large kitchen with a breakfast area, and a formal dining room. Beautiful ceramic tile flooring runs throughout the home, and all rooms have been freshly painted. Large sliding glass doors open to the oversized screened porch, creating the perfect space for relaxing, entertaining, and enjoying Florida's outdoor lifestyle year-round. Located in a quiet and well-established neighborhood, this home offers a fantastic location with convenient access to shopping, dining, schools, medical facilities, and everyday amenities. This property is situated in a peaceful and desirable community while remaining close to major highways, including Interstate 275, making commuting easy and convenient. Rental Information Rent: $2,950 per month Sale Information Sale Price: $675,000 Don't miss this opportunity to own or rent a beautiful home in one of Wesley Chapel's most desirable locations. Rent-to-Own Opportunity This property is also available through a rent-to-own (lease-purchase) program. Rent-to-own provides an alternative path to homeownership for individuals who need additional time to improve their credit, save for a down payment, or qualify for traditional mortgage financing. Under a rent-to-own agreement: The tenant and owner enter into a lease-purchase contract. The lease term may range from one to five years. During the lease period, the tenant has the option to purchase the property. The purchase price is locked in at $675,000 and will not change during the lease term, regardless of future market value increases. The tenant pays an upfront option fee, typically between 6% and 10% of the purchase price, which may be credited toward the purchase if the option is exercised. Monthly rent is $2,950. Additional Financing Option The owner may consider providing seller financing of up to 60% for qualified buyers. Considering today's higher mortgage interest rates, rent-to-own can be an attractive option for buyers who wish to secure a home now while preparing for future financing opportunities. Don't miss this opportunity to own or rent this beautiful 4-bedroom home in one of Wesley Chapel's most desirable locations. Call or text: show contact info

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Need an apartment ASAP? We have select homes that are move in ready and would love to help you! ☆ Located in the Creeks of River Ridge, Cypress Creek offers a convenient location just minutes from the Earhart Expressway and the Huey P. Long Bridge, making it easy to get to downtown New Orleans and surrounding areas. Plus, enjoy being close to all the dining, shopping, and entertainment at the Elmwood Shopping Center. ☆ Inside each one and two bedroom apartment home, you will find: • Wood-burning fireplace • Personal intrusion alarm • Sunrooms with an abundance of natural light • In-home washer and dryer • Fully equipped kitchen Community amenities include: • Swimming pool • Grilling area • Lighted tennis court • Winding walking paths with bridges • Green park space Have a furry friend? Cypress Creek is pet friendly and welcomes your companions! (See website for full pet policy.) Schedule your tour today and come see what Cypress Creek has to offer! Contact our leasing team or visit our website to learn more. show contact info CypressCreek.1stLake.com

craigslist.title: Check out these superb diggs! 6Rooms/2BR+offc @ 1st level w/i Fab area
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Check out these superb diggs! 6 rooms/2beds + office all @ 1st level of magnificently kept neighborhoody property. Still new(ish) updates done in the past decade find some amazing upgrades highlighted in the way of this near Gourmet level kitchen and plush tiled over bathroom! Offering sparkling hardwoods, 1200+ square feet, refrigerator, dishwasher, disposal, gas stove, new windows all around, shared washer/dryer. Outside find your deck + exceptionally green yard space. New-er gas heating system, the list goes on ! 2 car no block parking at drive. Move date is immediate to August 1 (at latest). 1 year at a time terms. Comparable spaces for sooner if needed. Green area right by Belmont St. and on 2 trolley lines to Harvard. No fee prop. No pets please, no exceptions. Excites the senses! Call Jack Lambergs for addl details.

craigslist.title: Window Coverings, Online Payments Available, On-Site Management
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post 111 Summit Terrace, South Portland, ME 04106 Portland Maine apartments dont get better, more convenient, and more tailored to your needs and wishes for a dream home than the ones at Summit Terrace Apartments. All the features of our apartments are carefully thought out to create a home you can transition easily into and be proud of, all year long. We make choosing a floor plan easy and efficient: our two-bedroom floor plans come with or without a washer so you can decide simply what you want to invest in. Whatever you choose, our spacious apartments and the amenities that come with them give you a fresh perspective of the area: enjoy the views of South Portland from patios and terraces, relax at home catching up on your shows with cable and satellite, or rest easy knowing your rent includes utilities such as heat, water, sewer, parking, snow removal and lawn care, unlike many of the other communities in the area that leave these costs to you. Take care of your laundry in your apartment or at our on-site laundry facilities. Get your needs taken care of with on-site management, on-site maintenance, and 24-hour emergency maintenance. Dont leave your furry friend behind, our community is pet friendly. From Summit Terrace you can feel happy and comfortable, whether you prefer to stay in and relax or you want to venture out into Downtown Portland for work or for an exciting night out at the areas best shopping, dining, and entertainment options. Our location offers easy access whether youre walking or driving to Old Port, Southern Maine Community College, Bug Light Park, and Willard Beach, so you can have fun or take care of business without the stress of a long commute. See what it could be like to make Summit Terrace your new home by viewing our photo gallery and contacting us to set up an in-person tour! Features Include: Dishwasher Laundry Facilities Large Walk in Closet Microwaves Bike Racks Free Off-Street Parking Window Coverings On-Site Management Refrigerator Vinyl Plank Flooring Online Payments Available Controlled Access/Gated Call: show contact info For more information, visit us at: https://livebriarcliffmgmt.com/uqxp7wvq/summit-terrace We are currently offering 12-month lease terms at this time. *Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. Photos may not be of the exact advertised unit. Contact us today for the most up to date information.

A large, open-area living room with a picture window gives way to thoughtfully upgraded kitchen appliances, hardwood flooring, and a gas stove. Walk-in closets give you the room you need, and central AC and heat put you in control of your environment - no matter what the weather is like outside. Our modern community center, gated pool with lounge furniture, and fitness center are conveniently accessible and open when you need to relax, unwind or blow off steam. Located near the best of what Metro Detroit has to offer, President Madison has exactly what you're looking for in your new home. Just down the street you'll find wonderful dog parks and walking trails, or stay close to home and enjoy the lush landscape, mature trees, and tranquil open spaces. craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Cinnamon Tree Leasing Office: 7220 Central Ave SE Albuquerque, NM 87108 Call for details: show contact info Take a look at what Cinnamon Tree has to offer! Whether you're seeking a peaceful haven or vibrant city life, Cinnamon Tree Apartments is the perfect place to call home. Make one of our apartments in Albuquerque, NM, your next residence and enjoy spacious floor plans with practical amenities, beautiful community grounds, and a location thats close to anything you might want and need. The vibrancy of Albuquerque, NM, and our apartments for rent create an unparalleled living experience. If inside each one of our homes you can find exceptional amenities and stylish designs, outside of them youll discover a vibrant neighborhood that enriches every part of your daily life. Surrounded by a lush setting, Cinnamon Tree is the perfect place to enjoy the serenity of nature and engage in outdoor activities. We provide a sparkling swimming pool thats perfect for afternoon relaxation, as well as a covered picnic area so you can savor a hearty meal in the shade of a grand pavilion. You and the little ones will spend quality time together at the playground and on the basketball court. And even better than that, youll have access to a state-of-the-art fitness center and an inviting clubhouseboth coming soon. Other community perks are the laundry facilities, carports, dog park, and our maintenance teams reliable support. Reach out to our team and allow them to assist you in discovering your ideal two-bedroom, studio, or loft apartment in Albuquerque, NM! craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Bay Ridge Waterfront Living Wake up to breathtaking water views from every room in this spacious 900 SF one-bedroom apartment overlooking Shore Road. ✨ Apartment Features • Spacious 1 Bedroom • Water & Verrazzano Bridge views from every room • Bright, sun-filled living room • Large foyer perfect for dining or entertaining • Renovated bathroom • Beautiful hardwood floors • Five closets, including a California-style bedroom closet 🏢 Building Amenities • Well-maintained co-op • Live-in superintendent • Full-time porter • Evening & weekend doormen • Renovated lobby, elevators & laundry room • Key fob entry & new intercom system • Package room • Bike storage • Garage (waitlist) • Small pets welcome 📍 Prime Bay Ridge Location • Steps from the Shore Road Promenade • Waterfront parks, bike paths, tennis courts, playgrounds & ballfields • Close to Third Avenue restaurants, shopping & nightlife • Express bus to Manhattan right outside the building • R train at 95th Street just 3 blocks away • Public parking across the street 📞 Contact Benson Realty to schedule your private showing. 646 718 5199

craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post *This is a Monthly Price, Plus Tax No Lease, No Deposit, No Problem! Welcome to the Best Value in Extended-Stay Accommodations! Enjoy the convenience of no lease, no deposit, and no credit check for a hassle-free move-in experience. Your Safety is Our Priority: Our dedicated staff is on-site 24/7, and the property is key-controlled for your peace of mind. FREE Amenities Include: Free Utilities - Electric, A/C & Heat Secure property with key-controlled access Dog friendly - We love your fur babies! Flexible Payment Plans - Pay weekly or monthly Under-bed storage for extra space and organizatio Take a tour to see why we are different and better! Full Kitchens - Save $money$ by cooking your own meals No Lease - Check out on your schedule Free Wi-Fi & Cable No Deposit - Check-in any time Various Studio Layouts; Choose what's right for you! 24/7 vending machines with snacks and drinks All our rooms come with fully equipped kitchens, featuring dual stove-top burners, microwaves, full-size sinks, and refrigerators, so you can save even more on dining! Enjoy the convenience of on-site laundry available 24/7. We are also pet-friendly, welcoming up to two dogs under 50 lbs (pet fee applies). Book Your Stay Today! Experience the best value in Sonesta Westlake Cleveland! Limited-Time Offer for New Guests Only! Call: show contact info Pricing and availability are subject to change daily. craigslist.title: APPLY NOW FOR OUR 2 BEDROOM TOWNHOME WHILE IT'S AVAILABLE!!
craigslist.full_address: 4797 Kingshill Dr. near Morse Rd, Columbus Apply
craigslist.geocode_query: 4797 Kingshill Dr. near Morse Rd, Columbus Apply
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Kingshill Court is a charming community on the north side of Columbus located right off of Morse Road. We offer one, two, & three bedroom apartment town homes and one bedroom flats. Are you looking for a quiet community to call home in a great wooded setting? You found the right place! We are right off of I-71 only a few minutes from Ohio State and downtown. Our floor plans are spacious and the amenities make it an ideal place to make a home in Columbus. If you are into shopping, dining, and other various entertainments Easton Towne Center is just up the street (Polaris Mall is near by as well). So don't wait stop in and apply for your new home with Kingshill Court Apartments today! ***WATER, SEWER AND TRASH INCLUDED*** Granite-like counter tops* Fully-equipped kitchen with refrigerator, dishwasher, and disposal Private patio* 2 on-site laundry facilities Laundry connections * Full basement* Pet Screening - pet rent based on FIDO score Central air conditioning, 24/7 emergency maintenance Sparkling pool with sun deck Clubhouse, On COTA bus line, Professional, friendly, on-site management Nearby shopping, dining, entertainment Easy freeway access I-71 and I-270 Ample on-site parking Storage

craigslist.title: Luxury Model Home with 1st-Floor Primary Suite – Steps from Cosby High
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Luxury Model Home with 1st-Floor Primary Suite – Steps from Cosby High! 6489 Lila Crest Lane, Midlothian, VA 23112 3895.00 / Month 4 BEDROOMS | 3 BATHROOMS Interested? Fill out this form : https://renter.turbotenant.com/general-prescreener/T3duZXI6NDc4MjA1?property=2721024&source=cl Have questions? Contact the Landlord : https://rental.turbotenant.com/p/6489-lila-crest-lane-midlothian-va/95bcd3d0-652f-4363-befb-3146252d7fd2?source=craigslist Property Description: Experience the pinnacle of executive, maintenance-free luxury living at 6489 Lila Crest Lane. Custom-built as the premier Mungo Homes flagship showcase model, this pristine estate offers a brand-new build feel packed with elite architectural details, custom trim work, and high-end designer selections throughout. Spanning a rare 4-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom layout, this home is expertly designed for comfort and privacy. The main level features a magnificent private primary suite complete with a luxury spa-like bath, dual vanities, an oversized glass shower enclosure, and a massive walk-in closet. The heart of the home is a sun-drenched, open-concept family room that flows into a gourmet chef's kitchen boasting premium cabinetry, upgraded stone countertops, a large center island, and stainless steel appliances. A bright laundry room with a large window sits conveniently right off the entryway. Upstairs, three additional oversized bedrooms—each with its own private walk-in closet—offer the perfect space for a family or a quiet executive home office. Step outside to your private back porch to enjoy peaceful, scenic views of the mature woods and nature trails directly behind the home. Location & Lifestyle Highlights: Walk to School: A peaceful 0.25-mile walk directly to award-winning Cosby High School and local campuses. Convenience: Under 1 mile to Publix, ALDI, and upscale dining and shopping along Hull Street. HOA Perks: Includes neighborhood trails, a social pavilion with a fire pit, and fully handled professional lawn care for a true lock-and-leave lifestyle. Terms: Rent: $3,985/mo | Available: Sept 1 Qualifications: Multi-year stability preferred. Strict background check, 700+ credit, and verified proof of 3x monthly income required. Owner/broker. The main level features a magnificent private primary suite complete with a luxury spa-like bath, dual vanities, an oversized glass shower enclosure, and a massive walk-in closet. The heart of the home is a sun-drenched, open-concept family room that flows into a gourmet chef's kitchen boasting premium cabinetry, upgraded stone countertops, a large center island, and stainless steel appliances. A bright laundry room with a large window sits conveniently right off the entryway. Upstairs, three additional oversized bedrooms—each with its own private walk-in closet—offer the perfect space for a family or a quiet executive home office. Step outside to your private back porch to enjoy peaceful, scenic views of the mature woods and nature trails directly behind the home. Location & Lifestyle Highlights: Walk to School: A peaceful 0.25-mile walk directly to award-winning Cosby High School and local campuses. Convenience: Under 1 mile to Publix, ALDI, and upscale dining and shopping along Hull Street. HOA Perks: Includes neighborhood trails, a social pavilion with a fire pit, and fully handled professional lawn care for a true lock-and-leave lifestyle. craigslist.title: 3 Bedroom Bright, Clean, Quite
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post This spacious newly renovated 3 bedroom has great natural light and on the first floor of a duplex with a beautiful leafy view of parks on two sides. Perfect for People who work from home or need extra space including outdoor gear storage. Gas stove for the chef. Lots of cabinets for storage. Natural gas for heat hot water and cooking help keep the bills down. Tenants pay gas and electric. Across the street is 3 acres of fun at Roosevelt Park, which includes two tennis courts a baseball field, Two basketball courts in open playing Field and lighted outdoor skating rink across the street next to the house is another park called Little Roosevelt, so the house is surrounded by nature. Access point to the Intervale bike Path is only a block away for leisurely bike rides or runs through farmland community Garden’s and along the Winooski River. In unit large capacity washer and dryer so no going to the laundromat. The unit also comes with a dedicated parking spot and plenty of on street parking is available. Absolutely no smoking. Pets are negotiable with a pet reference and pet deposit. We provide a rental application. Everyone must complete. We have great tenants and we care about maintaining a friendly neighborhood vibe. Tell us about yourself.
